operations.label: output script files
operations._note: scripts/lib/ contains source-tree-only shims (re-exports from oversight/scripts/lib/ and shared/). At install time, oversight's full lib/ canonicals are already placed in scriptsDir/lib (oversight runs first in install order); the shims must NOT be copied or they'd overwrite the canonicals with broken-post-install relative requires.

operations.label: output canonical libs (scribe-db, context-db, cost-rates, transcript-telemetry)
operations._note: These are output-OWNED canonicals (NOT shims), so the blanket lib exclusion above must not skip them. scribe-db.js + context-db.js load with the scribe/learnings writers; cost-rates.js + transcript-telemetry.js load with rh-transcript-ingest.js (Phase 3.5 telemetry capture). Listed by basename; `from` selects the lib subdir. scribe-db.js was historically hand-deployed (PLAN-2026-06-11 Phase 2.3) — this closes that gap. Runs in OUTPUT step (before SHARED), and none collide with shared's config/file-lock/env canonicals.
